Download the local AI model. One-time setup - needs an internet connection.

AI Model: qwen2.5:7b (Recommended)

CivicNews will download this local AI model now - a one-time download of about ~4.7 GB that needs an internet connection. This may take 10-60+ minutes. After this, the AI runs fully offline on your computer.

It is safe to cancel and resume later from AI Model. If the download appears stuck for several minutes, check your internet connection, restart Civic Desk, and retry.
